name: How long do I have to file a lawsuit against Google for bad AI Overview advice that hurt me?
description: 1-3 years typically; varies by state and claim type.

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a lawsuit against Google for bad AI Overview advice that hurt me?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1-3 years typically; varies by state and claim type.
acceptedAnswer.description: Statutes of limitations vary: 1-3 years for defamation or negligence nationwide, starting from discovery of harm.[1] Heppner doesn't set timelines but underscores urgency in AI evidence preservation. Key factors: Jurisdiction (e.g., NY 1-year defamation); tolling for hidden harm; federal claims longer. Act fast to gather evidence before deletion. Consult attorney immediately.
